ogTitle: Seppings vs Seville Grove: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seppings and Seville Grove.
heading: Seppings vs Seville Grove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seppings, Western Australia and Seville Grove, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seppings has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Seville Grove (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seppings or Seville Grove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seppings has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Seville Grove scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seppings scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Seville Grove scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seppings or Seville Grove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seppings has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
